papers.title: Fine-Tuned Large Language Models for Detecting Social Isolation from Unstructured Clinical Notes
papers.translated_title: 用于从非结构化临床笔记中检测社交隔离的微调大型语言模型
papers.author: Chinthala, L. K.
papers.summary: Objective: To identify instances of social isolation and social support within unstructured clinical notes by leveraging fine-tuned FLAN-T5-Large, BERT, RoBERTa, and Gemma-2-2B models. Materials and Methods: The study used annotated clinical note spans containing social context cues from 326,847 adults aged [≥] 50 years between 2020 and 2023 to fine-tune each model. Performance was evaluated using Accuracy, Precision, Recall, and Macro-F1 score. A structured prompt was used to instruct the model to perform classification task and mitigate overgeneralization. Performance comparisons across the models assessed sensitivity, robustness, and false positive reduction. Results: FLAN-T5-Large achieved highest performance, with Macro-F1 of 0.92{+/-}0.04, demonstrating balanced results across classes: social isolation (F1 = 0.91{+/-}0.03), no social isolation (F1 = 0.94{+/-}0.05), and social support (F1 = 0.90{+/-}0.04). Gemma-2-2B produced comparable results, with Macro-F1 score of 0.89{+/-}0.10. BERT and RoBERTa achieved lower Macro-F1 scores of 0.77{+/-}0.17 and 0.80{+/-}0.21 respectively, with variability across categories. Discussion: A major contribution of this work is precise identification of multiple concepts related to social connectedness. By integrating annotated examples of both true and false positives, including negations and contextually ambiguous terms, the model better distinguished relevant social context cues from noise. Training on both social isolation and support provided a dual framework for comparative analyses and patient stratification. Conclusion: Transformer-based NLP models, particularly FLAN-T5-Large, demonstrated potential for identifying social isolation and social support in clinical text. These findings support the use of generative AI techniques to enhance detection of social isolation from EHRs, advancing context-aware healthcare analytics.
papers.translated_summary: 目的：通过微调FLAN-T5-Large、BERT、RoBERTa和Gemma-2-2B模型，识别非结构化临床记录中的社会隔离与社会支持实例。材料与方法：研究使用了2020至2023年间326,847名50岁及以上成人的临床记录标注片段（包含社会情境线索），对每个模型进行微调。采用准确率、精确率、召回率和宏F1分数评估性能。通过结构化提示指导模型执行分类任务并减少过度泛化。跨模型性能比较评估了敏感性、稳健性和假阳性降低效果。结果：FLAN-T5-Large表现最佳，宏F1为0.92±0.04，各分类结果均衡：社会隔离（F1=0.91±0.03）、无社会隔离（F1=0.94±0.05）和社会支持（F1=0.90±0.04）。Gemma-2-2B结果相近，宏F1为0.89±0.10。BERT和RoBERTa的宏F1较低，分别为0.77±0.17和0.80±0.21，且各分类间存在差异。讨论：本研究的主要贡献在于精确识别与社会联结相关的多个概念。通过整合包含否定词和语境模糊术语的真假阳性标注示例，模型能更好地区分相关社会情境线索与噪声。同时训练社会隔离与社会支持，为比较分析和患者分层提供了双重框架。结论：基于Transformer的NLP模型（尤其是FLAN-T5-Large）在识别临床文本中的社会隔离与社会支持方面展现出潜力。这些发现支持利用生成式AI技术增强从电子健康记录中检测社会隔离的能力，推动情境感知医疗分析的发展。

papers.title: An integrated computational, clinical, and functional framework for assessing PTPN11 (SHP2) variant effects on ERK signaling and neural crest cell behavior in Noonan spectrum disorders
papers.translated_title: 一个整合计算、临床与功能的框架，用于评估PTPN11（SHP2）变异对努南谱系障碍中ERK信号传导和神经嵴细胞行为的影响。
papers.author: Rodriguez-Martin, M.
papers.summary: Germline mutations in PTPN11 cause Noonan syndrome (NS) and NS with multiple lentigines (NSML), yet how specific variants drive divergent clinical outcomes through distinct signaling and developmental mechanisms remains unclear. We find that germline and somatic mutations converge on N-SH2 and PTP domains but diverge at residue-level hotspots, reflecting distinct selective pressures. Clinical stratification of 18 pediatric patients reveals four distinct phenotypic classes including (i) the NSML-associated c.1403C>T (T468M) variant, characterized by lentigines, moderate growth impairment, and distinctive facial features; (ii) variants including the VUS c.1282G>A (V428M) and c.1432A>G (I478V), which were associated with cognitive deficits and variable growth impairment; (iii) c.1471C>A (P491T) and c.1472C>T (P491L), predominantly affecting cardiac and growth phenotypes with limited neurocognitive features; and (iv) a severe, multisystem class comprising c.172A>G (N58D), c.178G>A (G60S), c.844A>G (I282V), c.922A>G (N308D), and c.923A>G (N308S), spanning cardiac, growth, cognitive, and craniofacial abnormalities. Biochemical profiling in HEK293T cells revealed that PTPN11 variants stratify beyond simple gain/loss-of-function dichotomies into strong ERK-dependent hyperactivation, moderate ERK activation with variable protein stability and the paradoxical c.1282G>A variant, which did not increase ERK phosphorylation. In vivo, this variant drove excessive neural crest cell migration in chick embryos, suggesting that its effects on NCC migration may involve ERK-independent mechanisms or context-dependent signaling not captured by steady-state assays. ERK activation did not strictly correlate with clinical severity, yet these functional differences were associated with distinct growth, cardiac, pigmentation, and neurodevelopmental outcomes. Our data suggest lineage-specific sensitivity to SHP2 dosage, with dorsal root ganglia neurons appearing more vulnerable to reduced SHP2 stability than melanocyte precursors. Although direct correlations between specific signaling defects and individual clinical features remain complex, our findings provide a refined framework for PTPN11 variant classification, and reveal unexpected SHP2 functions in neural crest development.
papers.translated_summary: PTPN11基因的胚系突变可导致努南综合征（NS）及伴多发性雀斑样痣的努南综合征（NSML），但特定变异如何通过不同的信号传导和发育机制导致截然不同的临床结局仍不清楚。我们发现胚系突变与体细胞突变均集中于N-SH2和PTP结构域，但在残基水平的热点区域出现分化，反映了不同的选择压力。对18例儿科患者的临床分层揭示了四种不同的表型类别，包括：（i）与NSML相关的c.1403C>T（T468M）变异，特征为雀斑样痣、中度生长障碍及特殊面容；（ii）包含意义未明变异c.1282G>A（V428M）和c.1432A>G（I478V）的变异，与认知缺陷及可变生长障碍相关；（iii）c.1471C>A（P491T）和c.1472C>T（P491L）变异，主要影响心脏和生长表型，神经认知特征有限；（iv）严重多系统受累类别，包含c.172A>G（N58D）、c.178G>A（G60S）、c.844A>G（I282V）、c.922A>G（N308D）和c.923A>G（N308S）变异，涉及心脏、生长、认知及颅面异常。HEK293T细胞生化分析显示，PTPN11变异可超越简单的功能获得/丧失二分法，分为强ERK依赖性过度激活、中等ERK激活伴可变蛋白稳定性，以及不增加ERK磷酸化的矛盾性c.1282G>A变异。在体内，该变异驱动鸡胚神经嵴细胞过度迁移，提示其对NCC迁移的影响可能涉及稳态检测无法捕获的ERK非依赖性机制或环境依赖性信号传导。ERK激活程度与临床严重程度无严格相关性，但这些功能差异与不同的生长、心脏、色素沉着及神经发育结局相关。我们的数据提示SHP2剂量存在谱系特异性敏感性，背根神经节神经元对SHP2稳定性降低的易感性高于黑色素细胞前体。尽管特定信号缺陷与个体临床特征之间的直接关联仍较复杂，但本研究为PTPN11变异分类提供了精细化框架，并揭示了SHP2在神经嵴发育中的意外功能。

papers.title: Healthcare Big Data Platform for Linking National Databases in Korea: System Development and Research Applications
papers.translated_title: 韩国国家数据库链接的医疗大数据平台：系统开发与研究应用
papers.author: Kim, Y.
papers.summary: Public healthcare databases in South Korea have been distributed across disparate government agencies, requiring researchers to navigate multiple, separate institutional approval processes for data linkage. To address the systemic inefficiency, the Healthcare Big Data Linkage Platform (HCDL), jointly administered by NECA and KHIS, was established to integrate 13 databases from 10 public institutions through a Trusted Third Party (TTP)-based linkage methodology and a centralized one-stop review process. Of 311 projects submitted between 2022 and 2025, 190 (61.1%) were approved with annual applications increasing 2.4-fold over the study period. The average number of databases per project exceeded three, reflecting a surging demand for integrated clinical data. Nationwide healthcare data from HIRA and NHIS were the most frequently requested databases (93.2% and 82.1% of approved projects, respectively), and co-occurrence pattern analysis further confirmed that both formed the core of the research ecosystem in combination with vital status, lifestyle, and cancer diagnosis data. By consolidating multi-institutional review and enabling equitable data access, the HCDL has emerged as a core infrastructure for data-driven and precision medicine research in South Korea.
papers.translated_summary: 韩国公共医疗数据库分散于多个政府机构，研究人员需为数据关联分别向不同机构提交审批。为解决这一系统性低效问题，由韩国保健医疗研究院（NECA）与健康保险审查评价院（KHIS）联合管理的医疗大数据关联平台（HCDL）应运而生。该平台通过可信第三方（TTP）关联技术整合10个公共机构的13个数据库，并建立集中式一站式审查流程。2022至2025年间提交的311个项目中，190个（61.1%）获批，年度申请量在研究期间增长2.4倍。每个项目平均关联数据库超过3个，反映对整合临床数据的迫切需求。健康保险审查评价院（HIRA）与国民健康保险公团（NHIS）的全国医疗数据为最常申请数据库（分别占获批项目的93.2%和82.1%），共现模式分析进一步证实两者与生命状态、生活方式及癌症诊断数据共同构成研究生态核心。通过整合多机构审查并实现数据公平获取，HCDL已成为韩国数据驱动型精准医学研究的核心基础设施。

papers.title: Association of Insurance Payor with Time to Discharge to Inpatient Rehabilitation After Ischemic Stroke
papers.translated_title: 保险支付方与缺血性卒中后转至住院康复时间的关系
papers.author: Shah, R. J.
papers.summary: Background: Transition timing to post-acute rehabilitation after ischemic stroke is heavily influenced by non-clinical factors, introducing potential systemic disparities in care access. We evaluated the association between insurance payor status and acute hospital length of stay (LOS) prior to inpatient rehabilitation discharge among critically ill stroke patients. Methods: Using the MIMIC-IV database, we identified ICU-admitted adults with ischemic stroke discharged to inpatient rehabilitation (n=1,285). The primary outcome was hospital LOS prior to rehab transfer. Multivariable log-transformed linear regression evaluated the association with insurance payor (Medicare, private, other/unknown; reference: Medicaid), adjusting for demographics, diagnostic-code counts (medical complexity), and ICU LOS (acute illness severity). Results: Median hospital LOS before rehab discharge was longest for Medicaid patients (13.2 days) compared with private insurance (11.0 days) and Medicare (9.5 days). In the adjusted model, Medicare insurance was associated with a significantly shorter transition time to inpatient rehabilitation, corresponding to a 13.5% shorter acute hospital stay (adjusted LOS ratio 0.87; 95% CI: 0.79-0.96; p=0.005) relative to Medicaid. Private insurance demonstrated a descriptive trend toward shorter LOS that did not achieve statistical significance (adjusted LOS ratio 0.93; 95% CI: 0.84-1.02; p=0.122). Other and unknown payor categories showed no significant differences. Conclusions: Insurance payor status serves as an independent predictor of acute care transition timing for stroke patients requiring inpatient rehabilitation. The prolonged acute stays observed among Medicaid beneficiaries suggest significant non-clinical, administrative bottlenecks in post-acute placement, underscoring the critical need for standardized, streamlined insurance approval pathways to ensure equitable neurological recovery.
papers.translated_summary: 背景：缺血性卒中后转入急性后期康复的时机受非临床因素显著影响，可能导致医疗资源获取的系统性差异。本研究评估了危重卒中患者保险支付方状态与急性住院时长（转至住院康复前）的关联。方法：基于MIMIC-IV数据库，纳入入住ICU且出院后转入住院康复的缺血性卒中成年患者（n=1,285）。主要结局指标为转至康复前的住院时长。采用多变量对数转换线性回归评估保险支付方（Medicare、商业保险、其他/未知；参照组：Medicaid）与住院时长的关联，校正人口学特征、诊断代码数量（医疗复杂性）及ICU住院时长（急性疾病严重程度）。结果：Medicaid患者转至康复前的中位住院时长最长（13.2天），商业保险（11.0天）和Medicare（9.5天）患者较短。校正模型中，与Medicaid相比，Medicare保险与显著缩短的急性住院时长相关（调整后住院时长比0.87；95% CI: 0.79-0.96；p=0.005），对应急性住院时间减少13.5%。商业保险组呈现住院时长缩短的趋势但未达统计学显著性（调整后住院时长比0.93；95% CI: 0.84-1.02；p=0.122）。其他及未知支付方类别无显著差异。结论：保险支付方状态是需住院康复的卒中患者急性期转诊时长的独立预测因子。Medicaid受益者中观察到的急性期住院延长提示急性后期安置存在显著的非临床行政瓶颈，凸显建立标准化、简化的保险审批路径对保障神经康复公平性的迫切需求。

papers.title: Shared respiratory infectious disease hotspots identify priority countries for pandemic preparedness: a Bayesian spatiotemporal analysis with COVID-19 external validation
papers.translated_title: 共享呼吸道传染病热点区域识别出需优先进行大流行防范的国家：一项基于贝叶斯时空分析及COVID-19外部验证的研究
papers.author: Ma, Q.
papers.summary: Abstract To identify countries with potential weaknesses in respiratory public health protection, we characterised shared hotspot patterns across three major respiratory infectious diseases and assessed whether the resulting shared hotspot scores were associated with worse COVID-19 outcomes. A Bayesian multivariate shared-component spatiotemporal model was fitted to data from 204 countries over 1990-2023 using Global Burden of Disease 2023 estimates to derive a shared hotspot score for each country. Generalized estimating equation negative binomial models were then used to examine associations between the shared hotspot score and COVID-19 incidence and mortality over 2020-2023. The shared hotspot score showed substantial cross-country heterogeneity, with the highest values concentrated in sub-Saharan Africa, South Asia, and Southeast Asia. Tuberculosis showed the strongest contribution to the shared spatial component (lambda = 1.657, 95% highest density interval: 0.883-2.506). Higher shared hotspot scores were significantly associated with both higher COVID-19 incidence (incidence rate ratio = 1.6783, 95% confidence interval: 1.4564-1.9340; p = 8.308 x 10^-13) and mortality (incidence rate ratio = 1.7436, 95% confidence interval: 1.5061-2.0186; p = 9.912 x 10^-14). Countries with persistently high co-occurrence of common respiratory infectious diseases also experienced worse COVID-19 outcomes, suggesting that the shared hotspot score may inform preparedness-oriented surveillance and resource allocation for future large-scale respiratory epidemics or pandemics.
papers.translated_summary: 为识别呼吸系统公共卫生防护方面存在潜在薄弱环节的国家，我们分析了三种主要呼吸道传染病的共同热点模式，并评估了由此得出的共同热点评分是否与更严重的新冠疫情结局相关。基于全球疾病负担2023年估算数据，对1990-2023年间204个国家的数据拟合了贝叶斯多变量共享成分时空模型，为每个国家计算共同热点评分。随后采用广义估计方程负二项模型，分析2020-2023年间共同热点评分与新冠发病率和死亡率之间的关联。共同热点评分呈现显著的跨国异质性，最高值集中在撒哈拉以南非洲、南亚和东南亚地区。结核病对共享空间成分的贡献最大（λ=1.657，95%最高密度区间：0.883-2.506）。较高的共同热点评分与更高的新冠发病率（发病率比=1.6783，95%置信区间：1.4564-1.9340；p=8.308×10^-13）和死亡率（发病率比=1.7436，95%置信区间：1.5061-2.0186；p=9.912×10^-14）均显著相关。常见呼吸道传染病持续高发的国家也经历了更严重的新冠疫情结局，表明共同热点评分可为未来大规模呼吸道流行病或大流行病的防范性监测和资源分配提供参考依据。

papers.title: Surveillance-adjusted syphilis risk mapping across U.S. counties: a Bayesian spatial analysis with external validation against HIV and gonorrhea outcomes
papers.translated_title: 美国各县经监测调整的梅毒风险地图：一项基于贝叶斯空间分析并与HIV及淋病结果进行外部验证的研究
papers.author: Ma, Q.
papers.summary: Abstract Objectives: To estimate surveillance-adjusted county-level residual syphilis risk, quantify posterior support for elevated risk, and identify the geographic distribution of stably high-risk areas across the contiguous United States and the District of Columbia. Methods: County-year primary and secondary syphilis counts from 3,109 counties during 2010-2022 were analyzed using a Bayesian negative-binomial spatial model with county-level covariates capturing social vulnerability and healthcare and surveillance related structure. Residual spatial risk, posterior exceedance probabilities, and stably high-risk counties were estimated. External validation examined whether county-level residual syphilis risk was associated with HIV and gonorrhea burden. Results: A total of 850 stably high-risk counties were identified. These counties were concentrated in the southeastern United States and along the Gulf Coast, with additional clusters in the north-central region and along the Atlantic and Pacific coasts. The social vulnerability index showed the strongest positive association with reported syphilis rates, followed by primary care physician density. External validation and sensitivity analyses showed that higher county-level residual syphilis risk estimates were positively associated with higher HIV diagnosis rates and gonorrhea rates, indicating that these estimates were not merely model-derived numerical outputs but were meaningfully related to the county-level distribution of sexually transmitted infection risk. These findings indicate that surveillance-adjusted residual spatial risk estimates and posterior exceedance probabilities may provide useful county-level evidence for syphilis control prioritization and resource allocation.
papers.translated_summary: 摘要 目的：估算经监测调整后的县级残余梅毒风险，量化高风险的后验概率，并识别美国本土及哥伦比亚特区持续高风险区域的地理分布。方法：采用贝叶斯负二项空间模型，分析2010-2022年间3109个县的县级年度一期及二期梅毒病例数，模型纳入反映社会脆弱性、医疗及监测相关结构的县级协变量。估算残余空间风险、后验超标概率及持续高风险县。外部验证检验县级残余梅毒风险是否与HIV及淋病负担相关。结果：共识别850个持续高风险县，这些县集中在美国东南部及墨西哥湾沿岸，中北部地区及大西洋与太平洋沿岸也存在额外聚集。社会脆弱性指数与报告梅毒发病率呈最强正相关，其次为初级保健医生密度。外部验证及敏感性分析显示，较高的县级残余梅毒风险估计值与较高的HIV诊断率及淋病发病率呈正相关，表明这些估计值并非仅为模型衍生的数值输出，而是与县级性传播感染风险分布具有实际关联。这些发现表明，经监测调整的残余空间风险估计值及后验超标概率可为梅毒防控优先级排序及资源分配提供有用的县级证据。

papers.title: Per- and Polyfluoroalkyl Substances Exposure in New Jersey Prostate Cancer Survivors: A Pilot Biomonitoring Study
papers.translated_title: 新泽西州前列腺癌幸存者中的全氟和多氟烷基物质暴露：一项初步生物监测研究
papers.author: Joseph, S. A.
papers.summary: Background: Men with prostate cancer (PCa) may be especially vulnerable to per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS) exposure due to their endocrine-disrupting and cardiometabolic impacts and cardiotoxicity and immune suppression of treatments. Objective: A pilot study was launched to measure serum and tap water PFAS concentrations in PCa survivors. Methods: Men with PCa were recruited from Rutgers Cancer Institute between February 2025 and March 2026, with ongoing enrollment and follow-up. Eligible men were aged [≥]40 years and either on active surveillance or within 3-12 months of initial definitive treatment. Participants provided blood and residential tap water samples, which were analyzed using mass spectrometry (serum) and modified EPA method 537 (water). Geometric means were used to summarize PFAS concentrations by race and assess serum-tap water correlations. Results: Of 235 eligible patients, 124 (60%) enrolled. Median age was 64 years; 63% were non-Hispanic White, 43% had a Gleason score [≤]6. Roughly half of participants provided serum and/or tap water samples. In serum, six PFAS analytes had >80% detection; of these analytes, median concentrations ranged from 0.13 ng/mL (IQR: 0.07-0.20) for PFHpS to 2.55 ng/mL (IQR:1.54-3.82) for nPFOS. Among 74 tap water samples, 9 PFAS analytes had >60% detection; of these, median concentrations of PFNA (0.56 ng/L; IQR: 0.33-0.75), PFOA (3.75 ng/L; IQR: 1.21-5.27), and PFOS (2.29 ng/L; IQR: 0.46-2.89), were below New Jersey Maximum Contaminant Levels. Non-White participants had significantly higher levels of multiple PFAS analytes in both serum and tap water. Serum-tap water correlations were modest (r=0.22-0.41). Significance: The pilot study has demonstrated both the feasibility and importance of studying PFAS exposure pathways as well as potential impacts of PFAS exposure in diverse populations. Keywords: Prostatic Neoplasms, Per- and Polyfluoroalkyl Substances (PFAS), Biomonitoring, Environmental Exposure, Cohort Studies, Pilot study Impact Statement: This study provides some of the first estimates of PFAS exposure among prostate cancer patients in serum and tap water, showing moderate correlations between tap water and serum concentrations of specific PFAS analytes. These findings can support larger studies to identify environmental exposure sources and evaluate the role of PFAS in prostate cancer progression and outcomes.
papers.translated_summary: 背景：前列腺癌（PCa）患者可能因全氟和多氟烷基物质（PFAS）的内分泌干扰及心脏代谢影响，以及治疗引发的心脏毒性和免疫抑制，而对其暴露尤为敏感。目的：开展一项初步研究，测量PCa幸存者血清和自来水中的PFAS浓度。方法：于2025年2月至2026年3月期间，从罗格斯癌症研究所招募PCa男性患者，持续进行入组和随访。符合条件的男性年龄≥40岁，且处于主动监测阶段或初始根治性治疗后3-12个月内。参与者提供血液和住宅自来水样本，采用质谱法（血清）和改良EPA方法537（水）进行分析。通过几何均值按种族总结PFAS浓度，并评估血清-自来水相关性。结果：在235名符合条件的患者中，124人（60%）入组。中位年龄64岁；63%为非西班牙裔白人，43%的格里森评分≤6。约半数参与者提供了血清和/或自来水样本。血清中，六种PFAS分析物的检出率>80%；这些分析物的中位浓度范围为0.13 ng/mL（四分位距：0.07-0.20，PFHpS）至2.55 ng/mL（四分位距：1.54-3.82，nPFOS）。在74份自来水样本中，9种PFAS分析物的检出率>60%；其中，PFNA（0.56 ng/L；四分位距：0.33-0.75）、PFOA（3.75 ng/L；四分位距：1.21-5.27）和PFOS（2.29 ng/L；四分位距：0.46-2.89）的中位浓度均低于新泽西州最大污染物水平。非白人参与者在血清和自来水中的多种PFAS分析物水平显著更高。血清-自来水相关性较弱（r=0.22-0.41）。意义：该初步研究证明了在多样化人群中研究PFAS暴露途径及其潜在影响的重要性和可行性。关键词：前列腺肿瘤，全氟和多氟烷基物质（PFAS），生物监测，环境暴露，队列研究，初步研究影响声明：本研究首次提供了前列腺癌患者血清和自来水中PFAS暴露的估算数据，显示特定PFAS分析物在自来水与血清浓度之间存在中等相关性。这些发现可为更大规模研究提供支持，以识别环境暴露来源并评估PFAS在前列腺癌进展和结局中的作用。

papers.title: Modelling a tobacco-free generation policy in Australia: population health impacts under illicit market uncertainty
papers.translated_title: 在澳大利亚模拟无烟一代政策：非法市场不确定性下的人口健康影响
papers.author: Howe, S.
papers.summary: Objective To estimate the potential health and equity impacts of a tobacco free generation (TFG) and T21 policy (increasing the legal age of sale to 21) in Australia, in the context of a complex market including widespread illicit tobacco and e-cigarette product availability. Design A Markov macrosimulation model, parameterised with yearly net movements between legal smoking, illicit smoking, vaping, and dual use states, combined with a proportional multi-state lifetable. Setting The Australian population, modelled as an open cohort for 40-years. Intervention A 'business-as-usual' (BAU) scenario was compared to TFG and T21 policies, with both starting in 2026. Variations to policy impacts were tested under increasing background illicit market enforcement. Main outcome measures The model estimates the health-adjusted life years (HALYs) and deaths over 40 years, under each scenario, with differences across age and socioeconomic status (SES) presented. Results The TFG policy reduced daily smoking prevalence among 15-24-year-olds to 4.6% (95% uncertainty interval [UI] 3.8-5.7%) in 20 years' time, compared to 7.2% under the T21 policy and 7.9% under BAU trends. Vaping was minimally impacted by either policy. The TFG policy resulted in 178,000 (95% UI 87,800-314,000) HALYs being gained over 40 years. The policy impact was largest when accompanied by increased illicit market enforcement, reducing daily smoking among 15-24-year-olds to 1.4% within 20 years. Both policies had greater prevalence and health impacts on more disadvantaged compared to advantaged SES groups. Conclusion A TFG policy is expected to produce long-term benefits for the Australian population but would be most effective in combination with increased enforcement of illicit tobacco and e-cigarette markets. Novel strategies to increase quitting in addition to reducing uptake are needed to improve tobacco-related outcomes in the short to medium term.
papers.translated_summary: 目的 在包括广泛非法烟草和电子烟产品供应的复杂市场背景下，评估澳大利亚实施无烟一代政策（TFG）和T21政策（将法定购买年龄提高至21岁）的潜在健康与公平影响。设计 采用马尔可夫宏观模拟模型，参数化设定合法吸烟、非法吸烟、电子烟使用及双重使用状态之间的年度净转移，并结合比例多状态生命表。设置 以澳大利亚人口为对象，建立40年开放队列模型。干预 将"常规情景"（BAU）与2026年同时启动的TFG和T21政策进行比较，并在加强非法市场执法力度的背景下测试政策影响的变化。主要结局指标 模型估算各情景下40年间的健康调整生命年（HALYs）和死亡人数，并呈现不同年龄和社会经济地位（SES）群体的差异。结果 TFG政策实施20年后，15-24岁人群的每日吸烟率降至4.6%（95%不确定性区间[UI] 3.8-5.7%），而T21政策下为7.2%，BAU趋势下为7.9%。两种政策对电子烟使用影响甚微。TFG政策在40年间累计增加178,000（95% UI 87,800-314,000）个HALYs。当配合加强非法市场执法时政策影响最大，20年内15-24岁人群每日吸烟率降至1.4%。两种政策对低社会经济地位群体的吸烟率及健康影响均大于高社会经济地位群体。结论 TFG政策预计将为澳大利亚人口带来长期健康效益，但需与加强非法烟草和电子烟市场执法相结合才能发挥最大效果。除减少吸烟起始外，还需制定促进戒烟的新策略以改善中短期烟草相关健康结局。

papers.title: Exploring Attitudes of Primary Caregivers Towards Pediatric Tissue-Based Research using Large Language Models: Insights from Rural and Urban Community Calls and Surveys
papers.translated_title: 利用大型语言模型探究主要照护者对儿科组织研究的态度：来自城乡社区通话与调查的见解
papers.author: Chotani, A.
papers.summary: Objectives: Explore the perspectives of primary caregivers towards pediatric tissue-based research participation. Design: Cross-sectional. Setting: Two academic pediatric gastroenterology sites in the United States, including one serving a largely rural referral population and one urban clinic population. Participants: Primary caregivers of children who underwent endoscopy between 2017-2018 at UVA or were seen in the clinic setting between 2024-2025 at Tulane and referred by their child's gastroenterologist to complete an electronic survey. Measures and Analysis: Primary caregiver attitudes, motivations, and concerns toward pediatric tissue-based research were explored using descriptive-focused coding in NVivo and a large language model (LLM) processing pipeline based on OpenAI's GPT-4 for thematic, emotional, and sentiment analyses. Results: Data were analyzed from 92 primary caregivers. Overall, respondents were amenable to having their children provide specimens for research. Primary motivations included a desire to help others or advance science, and perceived medical benefits for their child so long as specimen collection did not cause additional distress. Discomfort with participation was often linked to prior traumatic clinical experiences, concerns about additional biopsies causing unnecessary discomfort, or privacy issues. A desire to help others and potentially their own child was the strongest motivator for participation, while scheduling constraints and perceived risks to the child's health were the main barriers. Conclusions: At both sites, primary caregivers expressed strong willingness to participate in pediatric research. Primary concerns included perceived invasiveness of biospecimen collection and potential for additional discomfort. Limitations of the study included the unstructured nature of the data making the analysis and interpretation challenging. Strengths included two demographically diverse sites, intentional enrollment of primary caregivers of children both with and without invasive diagnostic testing, and use of LLM based analyses.
papers.translated_summary: 目的：探讨主要照护者对儿童组织样本研究参与的看法。设计：横断面研究。场所：美国两所学术型儿科胃肠病学中心，其中一所服务于以农村为主的转诊人群，另一所服务于城市门诊人群。参与者：2017-2018年在弗吉尼亚大学接受内镜检查，或2024-2025年在杜兰大学门诊就诊并由其孩子的胃肠病医生推荐完成电子调查问卷的儿童的主要照护者。测量与分析：采用NVivo中的描述性聚焦编码和基于OpenAI GPT-4的大语言模型处理流程，对主要照护者对儿童组织样本研究的态度、动机和担忧进行主题、情感和情绪分析。结果：分析了92名主要照护者的数据。总体而言，受访者愿意让孩子提供研究用标本。主要动机包括帮助他人或推动科学进步，以及在标本采集不造成额外痛苦的前提下为孩子带来的医疗益处。参与的不适感常与既往创伤性临床经历、对额外活检造成不必要不适的担忧或隐私问题相关。帮助他人及潜在帮助自己孩子的意愿是参与的最强动力，而时间安排限制和对孩子健康风险的认知是主要障碍。结论：在两个中心，主要照护者均表现出强烈的儿童研究参与意愿。主要担忧包括对生物样本采集侵入性的认知及潜在额外不适。研究局限性包括数据非结构化特性导致分析和解读困难。优势包括两个人口统计学多样化的中心、有意纳入接受和未接受侵入性诊断检测的儿童照护者，以及使用基于大语言模型的分析方法。

papers.title: Caregiver Needs and Technology Acceptability for Behavioral-Crisis Support in Children With Neurodevelopmental or Behavioral Conditions
papers.translated_title: 神经发育或行为障碍儿童行为危机支持中的照护者需求与技术接受度
papers.author: Patel, F.
papers.summary: Background: Behavioral crises are common and distressing in children with neurodevelopmental or behavioral conditions, and many escalate to emergency service use. Access to behavioral therapy is often constrained. Smartphone applications, in-home systems, and wearable sensors that could support caregivers during crises at home are in active development, but few studies have asked caregivers what they would accept or want from such tools. Methods: We conducted a single-center cross-sectional online survey (REDCap) of caregivers of children aged 5-17 years with neurodevelopmental or behavioral conditions, recruited as a convenience sample through flyers, email invitations, and in-person invitations during clinic visits from the neurobehavioral continuum of care at Cincinnati Children's Hospital Medical Center. The response rate is undetermined due to the open-ended recruitment process. Prior behavioral-crisis experience was not an eligibility requirement. The 24-item instrument covered crisis burden, service utilization, caregiver confidence and training, therapy access and barriers, and technology preferences. Analyses were estimation-first (proportions with Wilson 95% confidence intervals [CIs]; medians with interquartile ranges [IQRs]); three pre-specified bivariate analyses used ordinal methods (Kendall's tau-b and Jonckheere-Terpstra for ordinal pairs; Friedman for repeated ratings of five support functions). Recruitment is ongoing toward a target of 75; this interim analysis includes the first 55 respondents, and all findings are hypothesis-generating. Results: All 55 respondents reported that their child had experienced a behavioral crisis; 44% (95% CI 31-57%) reported crises at least weekly, and 35% (95% CI 23-48%) had ever used 911 or an emergency department for a crisis. Half of caregivers (51%) felt not at all or only a little confident managing crises, and only 46% (95% CI 33-59%) had received informal or formal crisis-management training. The most frequent barrier to behavioral therapy was long waitlists (51%; 95% CI 38-64%). Stated openness to hypothetical technology-based crisis support was high, with 64% (95% CI 50-75%) very interested in a smartphone app or in-home support system, 80% (95% CI 68-88%) willing to have their child use a wearable sensor (1 of 55 declined), and 49% (95% CI 36-62%) willing to share video or audio with a future support tool (a further 42% answered "maybe"; 9% declined). The most-valued features were a personalized crisis plan (58%) and safe de-escalation scripts (49%); the most-cited concern was privacy and data security (36%). Conclusions: In this small, self-selected, single-center sample, caregivers of children with neurodevelopmental or behavioral conditions reported substantial crisis burden, limited training, and constrained access to therapy, alongside high stated openness to technology-based crisis support; personalization and privacy were their leading priorities. These preliminary, hypothesis-generating findings can inform the design of caregiver-facing crisis-support technologies and larger representative studies.
papers.translated_summary: 背景：行为危机在患有神经发育或行为问题的儿童中常见且令人痛苦，许多情况会升级至使用急诊服务。行为疗法的获取常受限。目前正在积极开发智能手机应用、居家系统及可穿戴传感器，以在危机期间为家庭照护者提供支持，但很少有研究询问照护者对此类工具的接受度或需求。方法：我们开展了一项单中心横断面在线调查（REDCap），对象为5-17岁患有神经发育或行为问题儿童的照护者，通过辛辛那提儿童医院医学中心神经行为连续护理门诊的传单、邮件邀请及现场邀请招募便利样本。由于招募过程开放，无法确定应答率。既往行为危机经历并非纳入条件。24项调查工具涵盖危机负担、服务利用、照护者信心与培训、治疗可及性与障碍，以及技术偏好。分析以估计优先（采用Wilson 95%置信区间[CI]的比例；采用四分位距[IQR]的中位数）；三项预设双变量分析使用序数方法（Kendall's tau-b和Jonckheere-Terpstra用于序数配对；Friedman用于五项支持功能的重复评分）。招募正在进行中，目标为75人；本次中期分析包含前55名应答者，所有发现均为假设生成性质。结果：全部55名应答者均报告其孩子经历过行为危机；44%（95% CI 31-57%）报告危机至少每周发生，35%（95% CI 23-48%）曾因危机使用911或急诊科。半数照护者（51%）感到完全或几乎没有信心管理危机，仅46%（95% CI 33-59%）接受过非正式或正式的危机管理培训。行为疗法最常见的障碍是漫长的等待名单（51%；95% CI 38-64%）。对假设性技术危机支持的开放度较高，64%（95% CI 50-75%）对智能手机应用或居家支持系统非常感兴趣，80%（95% CI 68-88%）愿意让孩子使用可穿戴传感器（55人中1人拒绝），49%（95% CI 36-62%）愿意与未来支持工具共享视频或音频（另有42%回答“可能”；9%拒绝）。最受重视的功能是个性化危机计划（58%）和安全降级脚本（49%）；最常提及的担忧是隐私与数据安全（36%）。结论：在这个小型、自选、单中心样本中，神经发育或行为问题儿童的照护者报告了显著的危机负担、有限的培训及受限的治疗可及性，同时对技术危机支持表现出较高开放度；个性化和隐私是其首要优先事项。这些初步的假设生成发现可为面向照护者的危机支持技术设计及更大规模代表性研究提供参考。
